title: viola × tourbillonensis
intro: Viola × tourbillonensis, a hybrid species of the viola genus, is a plant that combines characteristics of Viola riviniana and Viola lutea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, Viola × tourbillonensis is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also incorporated into topical creams and ointments for its potential skin-soothing properties.
